## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are **signed off** (`git commit -s`) — DCO is required, see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I read **NON_GOALS.md** and this change doesn't conflict with it
- [ ] Tests added/updated and `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] If this is a load-bearing decision, I added/updated an ADR under `docs/adr/`
- [ ] If this touches a storage adapter, `rekoll.conformance.run_all` passes
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior changed
